title: 「As + 身分」句型
titleEn: Using As to express identity or role

source.file: Sentence Structure 31「As＋身份」表達角色或身分.pdf
omissions: English explanations translated from Chinese-only teaching text are faithful editorial translations.

formula: As + a / an / the / possessive + identity or role, + subject + verb + other information

formulas.formula: As + a / an / the / possessive + identity or role, + subject + verb + other information
As + plural identity or role, + subject + verb + other information

example: As a mother, I show my love for my children by taking care of them.
exampleZh: 作為一位母親，我透過照顧孩子表達對他們的愛。

examples.en: As a mother, I show my love for my children by taking care of them.
examples.zh: 作為一位母親，我透過照顧孩子表達對他們的愛。

meaning.zh: As＋身分表示「作為……」或「以……的身分」。

rules.en: Place an identity or role after as.
rules.zh: As 後面接身分或角色，表示「作為……」或「以……的身分」。

rules.en: The identity after as must belong to the subject of the main clause.
rules.zh: As 後面的身分，必須是主句主語所擁有的身分。
examples: As a teacher, Ms Lee helps her students.

rules.en: A singular identity normally needs a determiner such as a, an, the or a possessive. Do not use a or an before a plural identity.
rules.zh: 單數身分通常需要 a、an、the 或所有格等限定詞；複數身分前一般不使用 a 或 an。

rules.en: Put a comma after the identity phrase.
rules.zh: 身分短語後要使用逗號。
examples: As a doctor, Dr Lee explains the treatment clearly.

rules.en: Here, as expresses identity, not time or reason.
rules.zh: 本課的 As 後面接名詞短語，表示身分，不是表示時間或原因。
examples: As a parent, Henry listens to his child.

benefits.en: It shows the person’s role immediately.
benefits.zh: 把 As＋身分放在句首，讀者可以先知道人物以甚麼角色說話或做事。

benefits.en: It combines two ideas into one sentence.
benefits.zh: 不需要使用兩句短句，便可以同時表達人物的身分和行動。

benefits.en: It explains why an action suits the person’s role.
benefits.zh: 這個句型可以幫助你表達一個人的責任、觀點或應有行為。

benefits.en: It gives you another way to begin a sentence.
benefits.zh: 使用 As＋身分，可以令文章的句式較有變化，不需要每句都以 I、He、She 或人物名稱開始。

benefits.en: It is useful in speaking and writing.
benefits.zh: 你可以在自我介紹、面試、演講、作文、報告和討論中，用這個句型介紹自己的角色或從某個身分表達意見。

sourceOmissions: The PDF presents several Important Rules and Benefits explanations only in Chinese; their English versions are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using As + identity or role at the beginning.
Preserve the original meaning and use the correct article or possessive word.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 As＋身分或角色 放在句首，改寫以下句子。
保留原句意思，並正確使用 a、an、the 或所有格。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: I am a mother, and I show my love for my children by taking care of them.
questions.promptZh: 我是一位母親，我透過照顧孩子表達對他們的愛。
questions.answer: As a mother, I show my love for my children by taking care of them.
questions.answerZh: 作為一位母親，我透過照顧孩子表達對他們的愛。
questions.highlight: As a mother, I show my love for my children by taking care of them.

questions.prompt: Lily is a student. She asks questions when she does not understand.
questions.promptZh: 莉莉是一名學生。她在不明白時會提出問題。
questions.answer: As a student, Lily asks questions when she does not understand.
questions.answerZh: 作為學生，莉莉在不明白時會提出問題。
questions.highlight: As a student, Lily asks questions when she does not understand.

questions.prompt: Because Mr Chan is a teacher, he explains difficult ideas clearly.
questions.promptZh: 因為陳先生是一名老師，所以他會清楚解釋困難的概念。
questions.answer: As a teacher, Mr Chan explains difficult ideas clearly.
questions.answerZh: 作為老師，陳先生會清楚解釋困難的概念。
questions.highlight: As a teacher, Mr Chan explains difficult ideas clearly.

questions.highlight: As an environmental volunteer, Kayla teaches children how small daily choices can reduce waste.

questions.prompt: Adrian leads the project. Before work begins, he makes sure that every member understands the plan.
questions.promptZh: 艾德里安領導這個項目。在工作開始前，他會確保每位成員都明白計劃。
questions.answer: As the project leader, Adrian makes sure that every member understands the plan before work begins.
questions.answerZh: 作為項目負責人，艾德里安會確保每位成員在工作開始前明白計劃。
questions.highlight: As the project leader, Adrian makes sure that every member understands the plan before work begins.
